summary: Feature 6 Part 2: File Management Frontend UI Testing - All features verified working. Tested FileCategoryBadge, FileComments, LeadDetailModal Files tab with category filters, review workflow badges, and inline comments.
critical_code_review_comments: FileCategoryBadge.tsx correctly implements colored badges with icons for each category (REFERENCE/blue, LEGAL/red, PAYMENT/green, DELIVERABLE/purple, REVISION/amber, ASSET/slate, OTHER/gray)
FileComments.tsx handles loading state, empty state, comment list, and submit form with proper data-testid attributes
LeadDetailModal Files tab correctly shows: drag-drop upload, category filter pills with counts, file list with category badges, review status badges, and comments toggle
Category filter correctly filters files by category with 'REFERENCE Files (2)' type headings
Review workflow badges: 'Needs Review' (amber), 'Approved' (green), 'Changes Needed' (red) working
Approve and Request Changes action buttons appear for PENDING review files

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints working (GET files, PATCH category, PATCH review, GET/POST/DELETE comments)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test lead 'Summer Garden Wedding' with 5 files having different categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: File Management Frontend UI fully verified. FileCategoryBadge shows colored category pills. FileComments component shows inline comments with add/delete. Files tab has working category filter pills, drag-drop upload, file list with badges, review workflow buttons (approve/request-changes), and expandable comments section. Backend APIs all return correct data. No issues found.

features_tested.navigation_to_leads: PASS - View Projects button navigates to kanban board
features_tested.open_lead_modal: PASS - Clicking lead card opens LeadDetailModal

files_tab.drag_drop_upload: PASS - Upload area shows 'Drag and drop files here, or browse'
files_tab.category_filter_pills: PASS - Shows All(5), Reference(2), Payment(1), Deliverable(1), Other(1)
files_tab.category_filter_works: PASS - Clicking Reference shows only 2 Reference files
files_tab.file_list: PASS - Shows files with thumbnails/icons, names, sizes, dates
files_tab.category_badges: PASS - Each file shows colored category badge (Reference=blue, Deliverable=purple, etc.)
files_tab.review_status_badges: PASS - Approved files show green 'Approved' badge
files_tab.share_download_delete_actions: PASS - Action buttons visible on each file row
files_tab.comments_section: PASS - Shows 'No comments yet' or existing comments with author, type, timestamp
files_tab.add_comment_input: PASS - Input field and submit button visible

backend_api_tests.GET /api/leads/:leadId/files: PASS - Returns files with category, categoryDisplay, commentCount, reviewStatus fields
backend_api_tests.PATCH /api/files/:fileId/review: PASS - Updates review status (tested APPROVED, NEEDS_CHANGES)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/files/:fileId/comments: PASS - Returns array of comments with authorName, authorType, content
backend_api_tests.POST /api/files/:fileId/comments: PASS - Creates new comment and returns comment object
